identity_baseline: Large, green Martian humanoid; a powerful Thark chieftain and warrior.
stable_visual_summary: Tars Tarkas is a large, powerful green Martian humanoid of human scale. As a high-ranking Thark chieftain and martial leader, he possesses a commanding physical presence characterized by a large, powerful build. His appearance is defined by warrior-class Martian attire, likely consisting of heavy combat gear suitable for his status as a martial leader.
costume_signature: Warrior-class Martian attire; likely heavy combat gear for high-ranking Tharks.
continuity_constraints: Maintain green skin pigmentation as a stable identifier.
Costume must reflect high-ranking warrior status within the Thark culture.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific details of costume silhouette and patterns are unknown.
Exact age or stage of life is not specified.
